name: EnterpriseAgentFramework
desc: 面向 OA、ERP、CRM、工单等企业系统快速构建智能体，让 AI 在权限、审计与治理约束下安全调用真实业务能力。Build agents quickly for enterprise systems such as OA, ERP, CRM, and ticketing, enabling AI to safely…
descFull: 面向 OA、ERP、CRM、工单等企业系统快速构建智能体，让 AI 在权限、审计与治理约束下安全调用真实业务能力。Build agents quickly for enterprise systems such as OA, ERP, CRM, and ticketing, enabling AI to safely call real business capabilities under permissions, audit, and governance controls.
